reviews.review_description: Mini fuzz is an awesome game with a great soundtrack too. A lot of excellent graphics. Our whole family loves to play, from our 9 year old to those of us over 35. I love GUMBO! He is so adorable and has the funniest facial expressions. An instant favorite in our house.

developer_response.body: We're happy to hear you're enjoying Mini Fuzz: Ocean World! Thanks for leaving your feedback!
